sentences.arabic: قَضَى الْمُسْلِمُونَ لَيَالِيَ رَمَضَانَ فِي الْعِبَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani su provodili ramazanske noći u ibadetu.
sentences.translationEn: The Muslims spent the nights of Ramadan in worship.

sentences.translation: Klanjali su, učili Kur'an i veličali Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: They prayed, read the Quran, and remembered God.

sentences.arabic: كَانُوا يَبْحَثُونَ عَنْ لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ بِنِيَّةٍ صَادِقَةٍ.
sentences.translationEn: They sought the Night of Power with sincere intention.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرُوا بِبَرَكَةِ الشَّهْرِ الْمُبَارَكِ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Osjetili su bereket blagoslovljenog mjeseca u srcima.
sentences.translationEn: They felt the blessing of the sacred month in their hearts.
